name: Compact Fresnel Light - Spot - Bi-color

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: EB0E43D5-FBEE-40E2-8A0A-BEA58CF9F4BE

comment:
Compact Fresnel Light - Spot Mode - Bi-color 2700K-5600K: The Compact Fresnel Light (CFL) is a new type of LED for studio, stage and architectural

lighting. With a 5.5” footprint, these versatile LED powerhouses draw just 40Watts yet pro-
duce up to 2900-lumen output at 96TLCI (Bicolor). (Tunable from 2700 to 5600 Kelvin).

The CFL is also available in a 3200K & 5600K Single Color version. Available in Black and
White. CFL outputs a hard-shadow rendering beam that fades from 100% at center to

50% at the edges, so it is good for mixing and overlapping with other lights while eliminat-
ing blinding glare.

Integrated Zoom
CFL has a smart ring-controlled focus system zooming from 12° to 52°

that is manually adjustable by turning the ring on the fixture. It is pow-
erful enough to be used as key, fill or backlight on positions typically

from 3 to 6 meter distances in any newsroom, on set or in architectural
applications when a compact punch light is needed.
